extractions.claim: temu.com ranked #377 globally on Tranco list as of March 19, 2026. Rank history shows slight improvement: 383 (Mar 15) -> 377 (Mar 19).

verification.verifier_notes: Live API data from Tranco ranking service, retrieved 2026-03-20

extractions.claim: Temu.com received 1.2 billion visits in February 2026, down 25.66% from January 2026. Average session duration 08:38.
extractions.evidence: SemRush data: In February 2026, temu.com received 1.2 billion visits with the average session duration of 08:38. Compared to January, traffic decreased by 25.66%.

verification.verifier_notes: SemRush website analytics data for temu.com

extractions.claim: Temu global MAU peaked at 530 million in August 2025. Cumulative downloads exceeded 1.2 billion by October 2025.
extractions.evidence: Sensor Tower data: Temu's monthly global active users reached a record high of 530 million in August 2025. Cumulative global downloads exceeded 1.2 billion by October 2025.

extractions.claim: US MAU declined 28% YoY to 133.6 million as of October 2025. US daily active users plunged 58% after de minimis ended.
extractions.evidence: As of October 2025, Temu has 133.6 million monthly active users in the US, showing a 28% year-over-year decrease. Daily active users of Temu's US site declined as much as 58%.

verification.verifier_notes: Sensor Tower and Bain & Company data. 58% DAU decline specifically tied to post-tariff period.

extractions.claim: EU MAU grew 74% YoY to 141.6 million. EU accounts for 34% of global user base in 2025. EU now surpasses US in user count.
extractions.evidence: In the EU, Temu has 141.6 million monthly active users, an increase of 74% year-over-year. In 2025, the EU accounts for 34% of Temu's global user base.

verification.verifier_notes: EU MAU (141.6M) now exceeds US MAU (133.6M), reflecting geographic diversification

extractions.claim: Low customer retention: only 24% of first-time buyers likely to return.
extractions.evidence: Customer retention remains a key challenge with only 24% of first-time buyers likely to return.

verification.verifier_notes: Industry analysis figure. Implies high customer acquisition cost relative to LTV.
